transcript.text:
How many can 1 person eat usually?
5~6 skewers
[In that case...]
[Just this much]
[All kinds of skewers]
[Just how many is this?]
[Did you finish it?]
[Congrats!]
I'm going out for a meal now
You're eating more?
-Can I go visit? -Yes
I'll be ready to use my savings
[Do you see this]
[Frozen Pork Belly]
[Is this what you're here for?]
[He's just as busy as Tzuyang]

She just had 30 skewers 1 hour ago
[2 mukbangs in 1 day] [How much did she eat?]
Hello everyone
I've been craving chicken skewers,
So I came to the nearest skewer spot
It's been a while since I had some
Let's head inside
[Dasaria Chicken Skewers] [Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu]
Hello~!
[Here's the menu]
[Reading the menu]
Well, then
Can I have 6 of these flavors? 4 skewers each
24 total, and Sausages
-Rice cake & sausage skewers, -For that one in particular...
-Do we have that? -We do

It's a hard one to make
It's okay, I got it
[Let's put the order in first]
How many can 1 person eat usually?
5~6 skewers
Is 30 a lot?
Try 25 for now
It's because you've never seen this lady eat before
-She's a really good eater -Do you know me?
-I do! -Really?
I didn't think she'd know me (embarrassed and thankful)
1 chicken skin,
10 chicken hearts,
Sausage,
Pupa soup, please
How does one stay fit as a good eater?

I'll give you fishcake soup on the house
Thank you
[Let's get the food started]
[Spread some spicy sauce]
[Salt]
[Black pepper]
[Salt Skewer]
[Cheese Skewer]
[Soy sauce seasoning]
[Soy Sauce Skewer]
[Red Chicken Skewers now!]
[Hot Fire Skewers]
[Have you seen this many chicken skin?]
[Sweet & Spicy sauce]
[Chicken Skin Skewers]
[Can't forget about chicken heart]

[Chicken Heart Skewers]
[And some hot fishcake soup for the cold weather]
Wow, thank you
That's salt and soy sauce
This is cheese and spicy seasoning
BBQ and hot spicy
Thank you
-Heart and skin skewers -Thank you
[Fishcake soup and pupa soup]
[Rice cake & sausage skewers]
It's all here
They usually plate it nicely
But I asked for everything at once due to limited space
It's going to be great!
Bon appetit
Salted chicken skewers first

Green onions and chicken
I don't like veggies, but I like cooked scallions
There's a chicken skewer philosophy
Dry chicken can't be on skewers Well, I mean...
I don't like dry meat
I love dark meat (thigh & drumstick)
And this is it
Very juicy and tender
I also don't like skewers that are bland
These are seasoned just right, perfect for some beer
Heart
These have to be good at a skewer shop
Did they fry this?
That's really tasty It's very chewy
It's important not to overcook the heart
Chicken skin

That's really big
That's really good
Was I hungry?
I'm hooked on skewers (dad joke with puns)
There's Hot Spicy Skewer
A very spicy one
Let's see how spicy it is
[Let's give it a try!]
[How is it?]
[I guess it's not too bad...?]
[No, I'm feeling it]
[Stop eating if it's too spicy!]
[It's okay?]
[No way]
[First aid]
[She's lost her mind]

Is it really spicy?
Yes, this is no joke
I can feel it swelling up my eye
I just finished 1 without any words
It's really tasty, but
So spicy it stings
Let's try just the sauce
The chicken meat was neutralizing the spice
[Eat something spicy if you want bigger eyes]
This is no joke
Let's cool it down with some soy sauce skewers
Are these all dark meat? They're very tender
[Found the rice cake & sausage skewer)
These need to be eaten when they're warm
I've never seen one this big
Do you see the size of this thing?

[Delicious]
[Still a lot of skewers left]
[Wait here]
BBQ flavor!
[BBQ Chicken Skewers evaporating]
[Cheese skewers too!]
This has to be dark meat
Did I try all of them now?
[Not the sweet & spicy]
Now just the sausage left
That tastes so good
You can see some are missing
She's reheating them up for me
-Thank you -I'll keep warming them up for you
Thank you
Eat those first

-I'll come back to reheat them again -Thank you
[She brought some sauce] Thank you!
I wonder what these are Let's give it a try
What? Wait...
My chicken skewer...
[Trying the other sauce now]
What kind of sauce is this?
I have no idea They're good though
What are these?
It won't come out
Hey!
With the cheddar cheese sauce
That's very tasty!
Lots of cheddar cheese sauce
It's not all dark meat
I think it just feels like that because she did a good job cooking the meat

It was so juicy at first
It doesn't mean it's dry now
But not as juicy as the first batch
[Warmed up skewers] Thank you~
She gave me lots of cheddar cheese
You ate a lot
I couldn't eat more than 10 myself
You had more than that
[Piece of cake!]
Almost all of them are left with a couple each
Except for these 3 spicy ones
What makes it this spicy?
It's too spicy
Excuse me
I can't eat these because of the spiciness
Then put that aside Don't eat it

It makes me tear up sometimes too
PD: Let me try 1
No, you can have all of them
I can't do it
You were good at eating crazy dumplings
[There they go...]
Try just the sauce first
[Well?]
-Is it not spicy for you? -It's not hitting yet
I guess he has good spice tolerance
[No.. that's not right...]
It's because you ate it with chicken
Try just the sauce
It's way spicier than fire chicken noodles
[I'm going my way]
[This one's for you in case it gets spicy]

[Finishing it up!]
Last one!
Best for last
I really do leave them for the last bite
These are really compressed
Other places don't usually serve this much
Thank you
Look how skinny she is
PD: I ate 3 hot spicy skewers
Only 3?
Did you finish everything?
It was a lot of food
The skewers here are bigger than other places
Do you want some Ramyun noodles?
I have to go eat another meal
You're eating more?

Some pork belly
[I wanted to give you more food]
Come by again some other time
I'll make you steamed egg
-I'll give you food on the house next time -Thanks everyone~
Thank you
[And 1 hour later...]
You don't see this too often
Bon appetit
[Frozen pork belly]
[As if it's your first meal]
[Inhale it all in]
[Fried rice too]
I thought you just had 30 chicken skewers
[How many kgs of pork belly did she eat?] [Coming up on next episode!]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
